source: ETF provider websites (Vanguard, iShares, Schwab, State Street), Morningstar
disclaimer: ETF data is approximate and may not reflect current prices or yields. Always verify current data before making investment decisions.
dataAge: Prices and yields as of early 2026. RICHY MUST USE WEB SEARCH FOR CURRENT DATA when generating allocation plans. This file is a FALLBACK reference only.

total_market.name: Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF
total_market.description: Tracks entire US stock market. The default choice for broad US exposure.

total_market.name: iShares Core S&P Total US Stock Market ETF
total_market.description: iShares equivalent of VTI. Essentially identical.

total_market.name: Schwab Total Stock Market Index Fund
total_market.description: Mutual fund version. Good for Schwab 401k plans.

sp500.name: Vanguard S&P 500 ETF
sp500.description: Tracks the S&P 500. Slightly less diversified than VTI but nearly identical performance.

sp500.name: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
sp500.description: Original S&P 500 ETF. Higher expense ratio than VOO — use VOO instead unless your 401k only offers SPY.

sp500.name: iShares Core S&P 500 ETF
sp500.description: iShares version. Same as VOO essentially.

international.name: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF
international.description: All non-US stocks. Essential for diversification.

international.name: iShares Core MSCI Total International Stock ETF
Vanguard FTSE Developed Markets ETF
international.description: Developed markets only (Europe, Japan, Australia). No emerging markets.

international.name: Vanguard FTSE Emerging Markets ETF
international.description: Emerging markets (China, India, Brazil, etc.). Higher risk, higher potential growth.

bonds.name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF
bonds.description: The default bond ETF. Covers entire US investment-grade bond market.

bonds.name: iShares Core US Aggregate Bond ETF
Vanguard Total International Bond ETF
bonds.description: International bond exposure. Good for diversification.

bonds.name: Vanguard Short-Term Inflation-Protected Securities ETF
bonds.description: Inflation-protected. Good for near-term savings goals.

bonds.name: iShares Short Treasury Bond ETF
bonds.description: Ultra-safe. Basically a cash equivalent with better yield than savings.

bonds.name: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF
bonds.description: Long-duration treasuries. High interest rate sensitivity. Good when rates are falling.

sector.name: Vanguard Information Technology ETF
sector.description: Tech sector. AAPL, MSFT, NVDA heavy.

sector.name: Vanguard Health Care ETF
sector.description: Healthcare sector. JNJ, UNH, LLY heavy.

sector.name: Vanguard Financials ETF
sector.description: Financial sector. JPM, BRK, BAC heavy.

sector.name: Vanguard Real Estate ETF
sector.description: Real estate investment trusts. Good income, place in tax-advantaged accounts.

dividend.name: Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF
dividend.description: High-dividend US stocks. Good for income-focused investors.

dividend.name: Schwab US Dividend Equity ETF
dividend.description: Dividend growth focus. Very popular for quality + income.

dividend.name: iShares Core Dividend Growth ETF
dividend.description: Focuses on companies growing their dividends consistently.

target_date.name: Vanguard Target Retirement 2035 Fund
target_date.description: Auto-adjusting fund. Shifts from stocks to bonds as 2035 approaches. Best for people who want zero maintenance.

conservative.name: Conservative (Low Risk)
conservative.suitableFor: Near retirement, low risk tolerance, short time horizon

moderate.name: Moderate (Balanced)
moderate.suitableFor: Mid-career, moderate risk tolerance, 10+ year horizon

aggressive.name: Aggressive (Growth)
aggressive.suitableFor: Young, high risk tolerance, 20+ year horizon
